problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
hypothesis: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Photonic. Photonic bandgap manipulation in metamaterial directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
